result.recit:
## 📂 Méridian Studios v. Cassiopée/Julien Mercier (Tohu-Bohu) — File Opening

---

### Where Things Stand

**Posture: time-critical urgency.** Score 57/100, 26 points from the target, 7 of 9 blocks secured. The objective is **to halt the exploitation of Tohu-Bohu**. The file is analytically sound, but **no procedural act has yet been initiated** — and the […] falls in **38 days** (August 3, 2026: five-year limitation period on the infringement claim).

---

### ⚡ LEVER — Admissibility (7.2 — weakest dimension)

This is where Cassiopée will strike in […], and if it falls, everything falls. Two adversarial weapons:

- **(i) Standing to sue:** the […] email → Méridian Studios dated 09/01/2019 does not comply with Art. L.131-3 CPI (no mention of rights assigned, duration, or territory). Cassiopée infers therefrom that Méridian Studios lacks standing to bring suit.
- **(ii) Limitation:** Cassiopée will argue that the limitation period began running from the […] public launch of Tohu-Bohu (bailiff's record of 10/02/2019), meaning the claim has been time-barred since October 2024.

**The counter:** on standing, the presumption under Art. L.113-1 arises from public, uncontested, and unequivocal acts of exploitation under the name Méridian Studios — Amazon sales (Exhibit 6 Bis), trademark registration no. 4449595, bailiff's records (Exhibits 1, 7) — without any formal assignment being required. It is for Cassiopée to rebut that presumption, not for Méridian Studios to justify it. On limitation, the cease-and-desist letter (mise en demeure) of 09/13/2021 interrupted the period (Art. 2240 C. civ.) → new period running until **09/13/2026**. This must be expressly pleaded in the summons (assignation).

---

### 🎯 Highest-Value Next Move: the Infringement Seizure (saisie-contrefaçon) — Now

This is the move to trigger as the absolute first priority, for three cumulative reasons:

**1. It beats the […]** The merits summons (assignation) must follow within 31 days of the seizure (Art. L.332-4 CPI). If the seizure is executed in early July and the summons is served before August 3, the limitation period is interrupted. Every day lost narrows the margin.

**2. It closes the imputability gap.** This is the most fragile block in the file (status *alleged*, payoff -4 on distance to target). No certified capture of Tohu-Bohu's legal notices on the […] has been filed. Cassiopée can deny any connection to the application. The bailiff's record on Carto Royale 2/[…] Play — developer profile + legal notices identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher — is the missing exhibit identified by the engine. The seizure produces it mechanically.

**3. It preserves evidence before it disappears.** Tohu-Bohu can be withdrawn or its legal notices modified at any time. Once the seizure is executed, the evidence is crystallized.

**Beware the threat of nullity of the seizure report (procès-verbal).** Cassiopée is preparing two […] (Adverse Exhibit 11 — TGI Paris 04/04/2014; Adverse Exhibit 18 — CA Aix-en-Provence 09/15/2016): absence of a separate service of process distinct from the order, and unauthorized presence of a Méridian Studios representative during operations. **Concrete counter in the petition:** expressly exclude any presence of Méridian Studios, provide for a separate act of service of the order prior to commencement of operations, and ensure that the seizure report records no unauthorized spontaneous statements. These precautions distinguish our seizure from the scenario in Cass. civ. 1, April 2, 2009 (no. 08-10.656) that Cassiopée will invoke.

---

### 🔄 What […] Has Moved Recently

The […] of **June 26, 2026** records an analytical refresh with 10 blocks advanced simultaneously. This is a deep analytical update — all blocks have been reassessed. In […]: **no new exhibits filed, no procedural act initiated.** The file is ready on paper; it is waiting for action.

---

### 🔍 What Needs to Be Developed — Unexploited Angles

**1. Trademark infringement (score 57, candidate not yet […])**
Trademark no. 4449595 is registered. If Tohu-Bohu uses the name or similar signs, this constitutes an **autonomous** ground […] that does not depend on the chain of assignment […] — it short-circuits the risk on standing. To be verified before the summons in order to plead multiple grounds.

**2. Unfair competition (score 30) — fallback ground**
Autonomous limitation period running from 10/05/2021 → **101 days remaining** (October 5, 2026). If the infringement claim is weakened on admissibility, this ground stands alone. Parasitism on the distinctive combination (name, visual identity, mechanics, […] database) has been documented and quantified since 2018. Do not abandon it.

**3. The Adverse Exhibit 12 contradiction — the boomerang**
Cassiopée relies on the judgment TJ Paris 12/18/2020 (Exhibit 12) in two contradictory ways: to argue that Méridian Studios holds no rights in Bastille, AND to present itself as the legitimate rights-holder. Yet that same judgment **rejected Cassiopée's […]** by […] its own unfair practices. This argument must be systematically turned against Cassiopée in the briefs: Cassiopée cannot derive benefit from a decision […] that condemned it for its own conduct.

**4. Originality — the analytical note is still missing**
The move with payoff 6 (block *Originality of the work*) remains open. Cassiopée will file Exhibits 10, 22, 16, and 12 to demonstrate that Méridian Studios has never […] been able to characterize the originality of Bastille. The counter requires an **analytical note** detailing point by point the creative choices […] that are free and arbitrary (formulation of challenges, category architecture, visual identity) and distinct from the competing games cited — to be produced before the close of pleadings. Rely on Cass. civ. 1, Sept. 30, 2015 (no. 14-11.944) to validate the characterization methodology.

---

### ✅ The 4 Moves to Initiate

| # | Action | Why Now |
|---|--------|---------|
| 🚨 | **Initiate the infringement seizure** (saisie-contrefaçon) (petition to TJ + bailiff execution) | Beats the […] of August 3, closes the imputability gap, crystallizes evidence |
| 📋 | **In-depth analysis of the Imputability block** | Precisely identify missing exhibits before launching the seizure |
| ⚔️ | **Red-team: stress-test nullity of the seizure report** | Fortify the petition against […] Adverse Exhibits 11 + 18 before filing |
| 🔍 | **Case law research: publisher imputability in mobile applications** | Shore up the fragile block with recent decisions on proof via legal notices in […] |

---

**In one sentence:** the file is analytically ready — what […] is missing is the act. The infringement seizure (saisie-contrefaçon) is the trigger […] that interrupts the limitation period, closes the imputability gap, and opens the path to the summons (assignation). **38 days. No margin.**

suggestions.label: 🚨 Initiate the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) (ex parte petition to the Tribunal judiciaire + enforcement by bailiff)
suggestions.reason: Beats the […] of August 3 (statute of limitations), closes the attributability gap by means of a certified process-server's report of the Tohu-Bohu legal notices on the […], and secures the evidence before any potential removal of the app.

suggestions.label: 📋 Conduct an in-depth analysis of the Attributability block
suggestions.reason: Fragile block (alleged status, payoff score –4 on the distance factor): precisely identify the missing exhibits and the act […] that closes the gap before initiating the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure).

suggestions.label: ⚔️ Red-team exercise: stress-test the nullity of the saisie-contrefaçon report
suggestions.reason: Cassiopée is preparing a motion […] for nullity (adverse Exhibit 11 + adverse Exhibit 18) targeting the composition of the enforcement team and service of the order — simulate the attack in order to bulletproof the petition before filing.

suggestions.label: 🔍 Case law: attributability of a mobile-application publisher
suggestions.reason: Locate recent decisions on proof of attributability through the legal notices of the […] in order to shore up the weakest block of the file.
suggestions.target: imputabilité éditeur application mobile contrefaçon droit auteur mentions légales […]
